content: pnpm workspace pitfalls: pnpm's strict node_modules isolation means a package that doesn't declare react/react-dom as peerDependencies won't get the host app's React linked in, producing a second React copy and 'Invalid hook call' errors — classic failure mode for a React component library extracted into a monorepo. Mitigations: declare peerDependencies explicitly, use pnpm-workspace.yaml catalogs to pin one version across packages, and/or resolve-peers-from-workspace-root.
